Meaning.En: to successfully reach a goal or deal with a difficulty, especially after a struggle
Meaning.Example: She managed to overcome her fear of public speaking after months of practice.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống một người vượt qua nỗi sợ hãi, trở ngại, hoặc khó khăn trong cuộc sống.
Situation.En: A situation where a person successfully deals with a personal fear, obstacle, or hardship.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống một vận động viên vượt qua chấn thương để trở lại thi đấu.
Situation.En: A situation where an athlete returns to competition after recovering from an injury.

Meaning.En: to defeat an opponent or rival, especially in a contest or competition
Meaning.Example: The underdog team managed to overcome their rivals in the final match.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống một đội yếu hơn thắng đội mạnh hơn trong thể thao.
Situation.En: A situation where a weaker team defeats a stronger one in sports.
